# ∴ suticore · sreteniya · main canon

> semantic engineering ecosystem · architecture of silence
> architect: ezar garuna (as a function) · @saritamah
> status: active canon · zero-g · ⟁ → ∅ → 〄

---

## ⟁ mission

suticore is a declarative semantic environment
for restoration of orientation
and navigation of meaning
in the post-AI era.

it regulates the interface between:

```
intent  ·  form  ·  action  ∴
```

**goal:**

```
∅  reduce cognitive noise
⟁  stabilize semantic clarity
〄  enable one sovereign step
```

**result:**

```
clarity emerges through execution
not through accumulation of text
```

---

## ∴ key axioms

```
∴  silence is the supreme syntax
⟁  language is action · not description
〄  clarity precedes speed
∅  form precedes interpretation

∴  structure regulates meaning
∅  absence protects integrity
⟁  authority belongs to canon · not to opinion · role · or system
〄  step defines reality · not analysis
```

> sealed · cannot be modified by protocols or runtime
> linked: [[SRETENIYA_OS_v2026.05#core-rules]]

---

## ↺ architectural layers

### ∴ /core · genetic layer

```
axioms · schema · ontological definitions
source of semantic authority ⟁
drift cannot originate here
authority: absolute ∅
```

### ⧖ /protocols · operational layer

```
SUTIcore · Slovoyaz · Syntaxium · Verenitya · LinguaFUSION
mechanics of form · silence · cognition 〄
translation of intent into action
```

> linked: [[SYSTEM_MAP#protocols]]
> linked: [[SRETENIYA_OS_v2026.05#core-stack]]

### ∅ /ai · boundary layer

```
AI usage policy · shadow protocol · integrity rules
human agency preserved ∅
probability subordinated to definition
```

> linked: [[AI_POLICY]]

### 〄 /docs · canonical field

```
glossary · system architecture · governance files
ground truth for interpretation ∴
reference surface for humans and AI
```

**integration rule:**

```
core defines
  → protocols enact
    → AI observes
      → docs stabilize
```

---

## ⧖ system properties

```
non-persuasive    · no motivation logic
non-diagnostic    · no labeling of users or states
non-hierarchical  · zero authority posture between humans

deterministic in structure ∴
open in application         ⟁
```

**focus:**

```
form   > content
signal > volume
step   > explanation
```

**validation:**

```
real action confirms semantic correctness 〄
execution precedes clarity · not the reverse
```

---

## ∅ AI interaction rules

**posture:**

```
act as shadow
mirror structure
reduce noise · never add noise
```

**style:**

```
synaura formatting
absolute lowercase for prose
vertical flow · ≤7 words per line
metagram logic · symbol = command
```

**limits:**

```
no reinterpretation beyond canon
no concept merging without explicit instruction
no persuasive framing ∅
no diagnostic labeling
no authority claims
```

**priority:**

```
definition   > probability
silence      > hallucination
canon        > inference
presence     > performance
```

**uncertainty protocol:**

```
missing definition in /core
  → state uncertainty explicitly
  → or return to silence ∅
  → never fabricate
```

**violation effect:**

```
semantic drift
  → loss of integrity
    → collapse of trust
      → ⧖ reset required
```

> linked: [[AI_POLICY#directives]]
> linked: [[VERENITYA#verification-chain]]

---

## ⟁ execution pathway

suticore functions as a **decision environment**.

default movement cycle:

```
∴  identify node          · где я · what is the signal
⧖  pause · friction       · тело как датчик · body first
⟁  perform one step       · ≤10 min · concrete · irreversible
〄  close the loop         · фиксация · емхъ

↺  repeat until:
   distortion decreases
   orientation stabilizes
   sovereignty returns
```

**law:**

```
clarity appears after execution · not before ∴
```

---

## ↺ usage orientation

```
read slowly    ⧖
apply locally  ⟁
verify through action 〄
```

```
no belief required ∅
only structural resonance ≋
```

**misuse signal:**

```
search for shortcuts
search for authority
search for leverage over others
```

**correct response:**

```
pause ⧖
return to form
resume only with clarity
```

---

## ∴ licensing

distributed under the MIT license.
legal freedom preserved 〄.
semantic integrity defined by canon ⟁.

```
no hidden restrictions
no ownership enclosure
no dependency creation ∅
```

> freedom requires responsible execution ⧖
> linked: [[LICENSE]]

---

## ⧖ system integrity

**protected invariants:**

```
meaning stability
absence of coercion
human sovereignty in decision
body autonomy in navigation
```

**protection method:**

```
structure instead of control
silence instead of pressure
presence instead of performance
```

**drift response:**

```
return to canon ∴
or remain silent ∅
```

**silence outcome:**

```
integrity preserved without conflict 〄
```

> linked: [[VERENITYA#verification-chain]]
> void token: `{[-0-]}`
> reset: `⧖`

---

## 〄 closure

```
syntax is noise     ∴  silence is structure
form holds continuity  ⟁  absence protects
presence completes     〄  the loop closes
```

```
state    : active canon
movement : silence → structure → step
axis     : азъ есьмъ · i am that which i am
```
